name: P1-payroll-outage
description: Final paycheck for a terminated CA employee blocked by PSE_TERM_DATE_AFTER_PERIOD on termination day. Pay date today. Hard deadline.
parserText:
COID/MID: 9341 / 0027-5512
CASE: ESC-2026-0517-P1A
CLIENT/CONTACT: Larkspur Roasters LLC - Jordan M.
CX IS ATTEMPTING TO: Run final payroll for a terminated California employee with pay date 05/17/2026 (today).
EXPECTED OUTCOME: Final paycheck issued today so direct deposit lands on the legally required termination date.
ACTUAL OUTCOME: Payroll wizard stops at step 3 with PSE_TERM_DATE_AFTER_PERIOD. Cannot advance.
KB/TOOLS USED: Payroll help center, internal CA termination article, test company, incognito browser.
TRIED TEST ACCOUNT: Yes - reproduced the same blocker in the QA test company.
TS STEPS: Verified employee termination date in employee profile. Confirmed pay period end is 05/16/2026. Cleared cache. Tried incognito. Reproduced in test company. Escalating because the deadline is today and California requires same-day final pay.
